summary: Tested redesigned employee visit form end-to-end. Backend: 5/5 pytest tests passed against public URL — POST /api/visits/{id}/checkout persists all new form fields with correct types (weather:'Sunny', plants_checked:12 as int, watering/pesticide_used booleans, pesticide_details string, photos_before/after/problem arrays including base64 data URLs). GET /api/visits/{id} returns the persisted form dict. Frontend (mobile 390x844 via Playwright as Ravi/ravi@ugrow.com): logged in → opened setup → clicked Check In (checkin-btn), visit-timer appeared and ticked every second, all 10 section chips rendered with correct testIDs, tapping nav chips scrolls to that section and highlights green, tapping weather-Cloudy selects, stepper +/- works (plants_checked reached 5), plants_dead stayed at 0 on decrement (correct floor), toggle-pesticide_used ON → 'Pesticide details' field appears (conditional field working), toggling OFF hides the field, nav-photos scrolls to Photos with all three add-tiles (photos_before/after/problem), sticky checkout-btn does not overlap Photos section (CTA at y=780, last photo tile bottom at 444 → clear gap), Complete Maintenance submits and returns to setup list showing 'Completed' status. Deprecated packages detected: expo-image-picker uses ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions.Images (deprecated since v15) — should use `['images']` string array. Inline component definitions detected: Toggle/Stepper/PhotoBucket are declared inside VisitFlow — Stepper.TextInput will lose focus on every keystroke because a new component reference is created on each render (typing digits directly into step-val-* won't work reliably, only +/- buttons).

ui_bugs.issue: Stepper is declared as an inline functional component inside VisitFlow. Every state update (onChangeText/setForm) creates a NEW component reference, so React unmounts+remounts the entire subtree including TextInput. Result: user cannot type digits directly into step-val-plants_checked/dead/replaced — the input loses focus after each keystroke. Only the +/- buttons work. Move Toggle/Stepper/PhotoBucket to module scope (or wrap in useCallback returning JSX). Reference: /app/frontend/app/(employee)/visit/[setupId].tsx:171-191

react_native_issues.issue: ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions.Images is deprecated in expo-image-picker >=15 (installed version 17.0.11). Replace with `mediaTypes: ['images']` (string array API). Emits a runtime warning and will break in a future major. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(employee)/visit/[setupId].tsx:108

action_items: Move Toggle, Stepper, and PhotoBucket component declarations OUT of VisitFlow (module scope) and pass form/setForm via props — otherwise TextInput inside Stepper loses focus on every keystroke and users cannot type digits directly.
Replace `ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions.Images` with `mediaTypes: ['images']` in pickImage (line 108) to remove deprecation warning and future-proof against expo-image-picker breaking changes.
critical_code_review_comments: Inline component pattern in VisitFlow (Toggle/Stepper/PhotoBucket at lines 159/171/193) creates a new component identity on each render — this is an anti-pattern that causes remount of children. Move to module scope.
onScroll handler is throttled at 80ms and iterates all sections sequentially — fine for 10 sections but could be replaced with reduce/find for clarity.

sectionDone.plants relies on `form.plants_checked > 0` which auto-triggers a green tick even when the user hasn't intentionally verified; consider requiring at least a weather selection AND a numeric value.
seed_data_creation: Created transient TEST_form_emp_*@ugrow.com employee and TEST 'TEST Form Customer' setup via admin API; both cleaned up by fixture teardown. Also completed live visit on Ravi's assigned setup (Ashish Khandelwal) — leaves a real completed visit in DB (harmless).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test at /app/backend/tests/test_visit_form.py covers checkout with new form schema (weather string, integer steppers, boolean toggles, conditional pesticide_details, photo data URLs). Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_visit_form.py -v`. Frontend testIDs verified on public URL: checkin-btn, visit-timer, nav-{plants|maintenance|pesticide|cleaning|drip|problems|materials|customer|summary|photos}, weather-{Sunny|Cloudy|Rainy|Hot|Windy}, step-inc/dec/val-{plants_checked|plants_dead|plants_replaced}, toggle-{watering|weeding|pruning|pesticide_used|cleaning_done|drip_ok|customer_present}, photo-photos_before/after/problem, photo-rm-*-{i}, checkout-btn. Employee: ravi@ugrow.com / Ravi@123 with one assigned setup.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs blocking the reviewed feature. Two non-blocking issues raised as action items: (1) inline component declarations in VisitFlow cause TextInput focus loss on the stepper's numeric input (reproducible by focusing step-val-plants_checked and typing '123' — cursor drops after each digit); (2) deprecated ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions.Images API. All 9 review-request scenarios (check-in, timer, chip nav, weather chips, steppers, toggle cards, conditional pesticide field, checkout persistence via API, no-overlap sticky CTA, empty photo arrays submit ok) verified working.
